name: the co-design planner honors any frontend framework toolchain choice (e.g. Svelte, not React)
command:
printf '%s' '{"complete":true,"answers":{"motivation":"revenue","availability_tolerance":"minutes","data_loss_tolerance":"minutes","budget_posture":"balanced","data_volume":"large","read_write_pattern":"balanced","data_cadence":"real-time","workload":"x","criticality":"mission-critical","data_sensitivity":"confidential","compliance_regime":"none","scale":"large","consistency_need":"strong","communication_style":"event-driven","integration_scope":"public"}}' > p.json
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/architect-session.sh --vision x --profile p.json --out-dir s --now 2026-06-08T00:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
printf '%s' '{"stacks":{"frontend":"svelte-kit"}}' > tc.json
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/codesign-build.sh" --requirements s/technical-requirements.json --platform azure --toolchain tc.json --json 2>/dev/null > plan.json
node -e 'const f=require("./plan.json").app_units.find(x=>x.unit==="frontend");process.exit(f&&f.stack==="svelte-kit"?0:1)' && echo honors-any-frontend 1>&2
